title: 左にホクロはないらしい

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship turns to me as we're passing through a
park on the way home.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: T to the rainer, aka "Trainer"!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Let's have a little swing-a-roo on those swingy
swings!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
We're gonna sing while we swing, and the first
one to bite their tongue loses!
choice_data_list: What kind of game is that?
What kind of game is that?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Girl
text_block_list.text: S-somebody save meee!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Holy guacamole! Is Armageddon upon us?!

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Girl
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Uh, no, it's nothing that serious...

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Girl
text_block_list.text:
But it's still an emergency! You have to help me!
Look over there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The girl, who can't be much older than ten, points
a shaky finger across the park.

text_block_list.name: Suspicious Man A
text_block_list.text: Argh! Where'd she go?!

text_block_list.name: Suspicious Man B
text_block_list.text:
I'm certain she ran off in this direction... Hey,
search the playground!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Wow, check it. They're literally Suspicious Man A
and Suspicious Man B over there.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hang on... Are they after you, kiddo?

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Girl
text_block_list.text:
Yes... Please don't be alarmed, but the truth is,
well...

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Girl
text_block_list.text:
I'm a princess from a faraway land, and they're
assassins sent to kill me!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: No waaaaay!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Then... Could it be? Are you the heir to the
long-lost Argent Kingdom?!

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Girl
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
History recalls how the king's twenty-one
daughters scattered upon hearing news of his
untimely death amidst the coup twelve years ago.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
O princess... To think! To think that you're safe! It
is an honor to meet you!

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Girl
text_block_list.text: I, um, well...

text_block_list.name: Suspicious Man A
text_block_list.text:
She's not here, either... Goodness, why must she
do this every time?

text_block_list.name: Suspicious Man B
text_block_list.text:
Please come out, my lady! Your lessons were to
begin quite some time ago! Your father is going
to be beside himself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...It seems the girl is being pursued for a
completely different reason than she claims.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Duty has called, and I, the Golden Knight, shall
rise to meet it! Princess, have no fear! I shall
protect you from these evildoers!

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Girl
text_block_list.text:
...Well met, brave knight! As my shield, see that
no harm comes to me!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Yes, Your Highness! I live to serve!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now, Trainer! My faithful right-hand
companion—er, that's a bit much. My faithful
right-pinky companion!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Have you a plan to keep Her Highness safe?!
Well? Do you?!
choice_data_list: I think it's better if we let them find her.
I think it's better if we let them find her.

When hiding a tree, one must make for the
forest!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Have you a plan to keep Her Highness safe?!
Well? Do you?!
choice_data_list: I think it's better if we let them find her.
I think it's better if we let them find her.

When hiding a tree, one must make for the
forest!

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Girl
text_block_list.text:
What? I don't wanna be found! If they find me, I'll
have to sit all alone and stud―er, I mean...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ugh! See, this is why you'll only ever be a pinky!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Princess, let us leave this pinky to itself till its
nails grow over.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now, climb onto my back! The Golden Knight will
save you!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, baddies! Get outta the way if you don't
wanna get hurt!

text_block_list.name: Suspicious Men
text_block_list.text: Ack! What the—my lady?! Stop right there!

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Girl
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! Wow, miss―oops, I mean brave knight!
You're very fast!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hyahaha! 'Tis I, the Golden Knight, lethal weapon
of the Argent Kingdom!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I end up with no choice but to join the men and
chase after Gold Ship as she flees with the girl.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Wowzers! That plan is perfect! I expected nothing
less from Trainer the Wise!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But this is no time for dawdling! Princess, this way!
Quickly!

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Girl
text_block_list.text: Huh? Where are we going?

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Girl
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wow! Is this a racecourse? I've never been to
one before!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Bwahaha! They'll never find you with all these
people around, even if they have a +1 in
investigation!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Look at that, Trainer. Turns out you do have
some good ideas sometimes! I officially promote
you from pinky to eyelash!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After enjoying the races for a while, we escort the
girl back to her home.
